title: armeria maritima var. interior
intro: Armeria maritima var. interior, also known as the Sea Thrift or Sea Pink, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It is a low-growing, perennial plant with delicate pink flowers and silvery-green foliage, commonly found in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Armeria maritima var. interior lie in its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, with herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions being used to harness its medicinal properties.
